The Services.

Hair & Style

The Cut.

Christopher Marrello, Creative Director

Every haircut at Raffaello is performed by a senior stylist. No training. No assistants. The person who consults is the person who cuts.

  • Women's Haircut & Style
  • Men's Haircut & Style
  • Blowout & Styling
  • Keratin Treatments
  • Up-do & Special Occasion
  • Bridal Styling
Book an Appointment
Colour

The Colour.

Mellissa Marrello, Colour Director

Corrective colour, precision balayage, and colour work that holds. Mellissa Marrello built her career on getting colour right the first time.

  • Balayage & Ombré
  • Highlights & Lowlights
  • Corrective Colour
  • Full Colour
  • Gloss & Toning
  • Colour Consultation
Book an Appointment
Spa

The Spa.

Full-service spa treatments at the same location as your hair appointment. One visit. Complete care.

  • Facials
  • Dermaplaning
  • Oxygen Treatments
  • Microcurrent Lifts
  • Waxing
  • Manicures & Pedicures
Book an Appointment
